description_long: This is a tall, slender glass bottle filled with a bright orange liquid, likely mango juice, as indicated by the label. The bottle features a green and white screw cap and a green label that wraps around the upper portion, with the brand 'EASY' and the word 'MANGO' clearly visible on the front. The label also displays a colorful illustration of mango slices, reinforcing the juice flavor. The lower part of the bottle is transparent, showing the vibrant orange juice inside. The back and sides of the label include nutritional information and product details in small print. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban refreshment setting.
description: A tall glass bottle filled with bright orange mango juice, featuring a green label with mango slice illustrations and a green screw cap.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the green and white label with nutritional information and product details.
description_view_1: Side view with partial label text and a glimpse of the mango illustration on the front.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the 'EASY' brand, 'MANGO' text, and a vivid illustration of mango slices.
description_view_3: Side view with more of the label's green and white design and less visible text.
